title: Users
subtitle: Manage registered users and send invitations.
search: Search by name, email or organisation…

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subtitle: One-time registration invite links and PIN codes.
invitations.newLinkCopied: New link generated and copied to clipboard

inviteModal.title: Invite a New User
inviteModal.subtitle: Generate a one-time registration link. The new user will complete their own sign-up.
inviteModal.notePlaceholder: e.g. New consultant from South Africa
inviteModal.sentToEmailDescription: If provided, the invite link will be emailed to this address. This is NOT the registration email.
inviteModal.resultSubtitle: Share this link with the person you want to invite. They must open it from a device where they are not logged in.
inviteModal.warning: This link expires after the first click. Do not open it yourself.

errors.failed: Failed to create invite. Please try again.
Failed to update role. Please try again.

resendModal.title: Send Invite by Email
resendModal.description: Enter the email address to send this invite link to. This is NOT the registration email — the recipient can register with any email.
resendModal.regenerateNotice: The previous link was already opened. A new one-time link will be generated.
resendModal.failed: Failed to resend. Please try again.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete user
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}}? This will also remove their Firebase account. This action cannot be undone.

passwordReset.failed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
